Name: SQL - Create Database If Not Exists
Description: Creates a database if the database does not exist without using SMO.

Parameters.Name: createSqlServer
Parameters.Label: SQL Server
Parameters.HelpText: The SQL Server to perform the work on

Parameters.Name: createSqlLoginUserWhoHasCreateUserRights
Parameters.Label: SQL Login
Parameters.HelpText:
The login of the user who has permissions to create a database.

Leave blank for integrated security

Parameters.Name: createSqlLoginPasswordWhoHasRights
Parameters.Label: SQL Password
Parameters.HelpText:
The password of the user who has permissions to create SQL Logins

Leave blank for integrated security

Parameters.Name: createDatabaseName
Parameters.Label: Database to create
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the database to create

Parameters.Name: createCommandTimeout
Parameters.Label: Command timeout
Parameters.HelpText: Number of seconds before throwing a timeout error.

Parameters.Name: createAzureEdition
Parameters.Label: Azure database edition
Parameters.HelpText: Defines the database edition for Azure SQL Databases, leave blank if not using Azure.

DisplaySettings.Octopus.SelectOptions:
basic|Basic Edition
standard|Standard Edition
premium|Premium Edition
generalpurpose|General Purpose Edition
businesscritical|Business Critical Edition
hyperscale|Hyperscale Edition

Parameters.Name: createAzureBackupStorageRedundancy
Parameters.Label: Azure Backup Storage Redundacy
Parameters.HelpText:
Defines the Azure [database backup storage redundancy](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/sql/t-sql/statements/create-database-transact-sql?view=azuresqldb-current&tabs=sqlpool#backup_storage_redundancy). The default option is `GRS` when not specified. Leave blank if not using Azure.

Note: `GZRS` is only available in a subset of Azure regions that have the current requirements: 

- Database cannot be a `Basic` edition.
- Have a geo-paired region 
- Have multiple availability zones within both data centers (primary and secondary).

DisplaySettings.Octopus.SelectOptions:
LOCAL|Locally redundant storage (LRS)
ZONE|Zone-redundant storage (ZRS)
GEO|Geo-redundant storage (GRS)
GEOZONE|Geo-Zone Redundant Storage (GZRS)

Parameters.Name: createSqlDatabaseRetryAttempts
Parameters.Label: Retry database creation attempts
Parameters.HelpText: Defines if the database creation attempt should be retried one or more times. Default: `0` (e.g. no retry)
